case_title: MCBRIEN, JAMES P. VS MCGOVERN, JOYCE ELAINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY MCBRIEN, JAMES P. AS TO DEFENDANT MCGOVERN, JOYCE ELAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2002 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCBRIEN, JAMES P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCGOVERN, JOYCE ELAINE SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-05-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-09-2002 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED CHECK, WILL DISMISS COMPLAINT. IF NO CHECK RECEIVED, DEFENDANT WILL HAND PLAINTIFF CHECK FOR $2,600.00 IN COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: FORWARD TIME EXPIRED RETURN TO SENDER.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO JOYCE ELAINE MCGOVERN RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
